stemHtml: A box weighing 300 kg has dimensions of 1 m x 1.5 m x 0.6 m. It needs to be loaded in a cargo hold compartment with a maximum running load of 257.9 kg/m. Indicate the side of the box that should be placed on the floor along the longitudinal axis of the aircraft.

options.b: The box cannot be placed directly on the floor.
